data.title: Pattern Group Inc. sets IPO price at $14/share, offering 10.7 million shares. Leader in ecommerce marketplace acceleration.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Pattern Group Inc. revealed the pricing of its initial public offering for its Series A common stock at $14.00 per share. The offering includes a total of 21,428,572 shares, with half being offered by Pattern and the other half by existing stockholders. Pattern is known for its expertise in accelerating brands in the global ecommerce market using advanced technology and AI. This move signifies a significant step for the company in terms of financial growth and capital accumulation.

data.title: PayPal brings PYUSD stablecoin to Tron, Avalanche, and 6 more chains, utilizing LayerZero and Stargate Hydra.
data.description: PayPal is expanding its services to include a decentralized version of its PYUSD stablecoin on various blockchains, including Tron and Avalanche. This launch will be facilitated through LayerZero and the Stargate Hydra bridge.

data.title: FPT Corp invests in Daythree, Malaysia's BPS provider, for APAC expansion. Enhances AI integration, grows delivery capability.
data.description: In Hanoi, Vietnam, a global IT services provider FPT has announced a strategic investment in Daythree Digital Berhad, Malaysia's top business process services and managed services provider. The investment, made through FPT's Malaysian subsidiary, aims to bolster FPT's presence in the BPS sector, with a focus on AI integration, while also strengthening its ability to cater to large-scale enterprises across the Asia Pacific region. This move marks FPT as Daythree's inaugural foreign investor, signifying a significant milestone in the partnership between the two companies.

data.title: 2025 World Manufacturing Convention in Hefei, China to showcase smart manufacturing and frontier tech from Sept 20-23.
data.description: The 2025 World Manufacturing Convention is scheduled to take place in Hefei, China from September 20 to 23. This event, which will be held in the capital of Anhui Province in eastern China, will spotlight advanced manufacturing and cutting-edge technologies. The theme for this convention is "Smart Manufacturing."

data.title: AvePoint becomes first B2B SaaS stock on SGX with dual listing on Nasdaq and SGX, continuing global expansion.
data.description: A groundbreaking milestone was achieved by a company becoming the first B2B SaaS stock to be listed on the SGX. Additionally, this company made history by being the first to have a dual listing on both the Nasdaq and SGX. This significant move has garnered attention in the business world and marks a new chapter for the company.
